headline: Keysight Addresses Cross-Domain Physics Issues That Leave Electronic Designs Vulnerable to Late-Stage Failure
summary: SANTA ROSA, Calif., July 21, 2026--Solution built to streamline design complexity launches its first application targeting structural analysis.
